contract_conformance.notes: Every contract seam verified end-to-end against contracts/wave-i-atelier.md. create_image is an ungated reflex tool that synchronously records a deterministic gallery entry (img_+10hex via seeded _seed_int, never uuid4), parks a transient pending_image_fetches request, and emits image_posted with url derived from the id (/assets/images/<id>.png). post_image is @billboard-gated and threads payload.image_ref=url onto the billboard_posted payload, validating existence + belongs-or-is-public (promoted=public). promote_image is wired into action_propose_rule valid_effects, scoped per-image (two distinct images may have open votes; same image cannot be double-proposed), passes at strict majority via the ordinary _evaluate_rule path, and _on_rule_activated sets plaza_banner_ref + record.promoted=True + parks a system image_promoted event in the spawn outbox. Snapshot is additive/conditional: gallery + plaza_banner_ref serialized only when truthy, pending_image_fetches never serialized, pre-Wave-I snapshots byte-identical. Loop drain is bounded by a semaphore (skip-under-load), fire-and-forget, emits nothing, never raises. Provider precedence EM_IMAGEGEN_MOCK > Cloudflare > Pollinations confirmed.

coverage.notes: Added backend/tests/test_wave_i_integration.py (11 cross-cutting tests, distinct from the impl-agent unit file). Covers the full arc on a REAL World+AgentRuntime+TickLoop (create->post->propose->vote->activate, plus the downstream consequence that a promoted image becomes publicly postable by another agent); the EM-155 replay/fork keystone driven through the genuine reflex dispatch path (two independent same-seed lineages byte-identical; two forks of one snapshot byte-identical; re-fork-at-a-point byte-identical; different seed shifts ids); JSON-roundtrip snapshot fidelity with gallery+banner; pre-Wave-I and empty-gallery snapshots byte-identical to baseline; and hermetic loop drain (writes mock PNG under cap, skips over cap, no-op when empty, never raises). Impl-agent unit tests (26) cover schema/registry/gate/dispatch and per-method behavior; no duplication. Determinism verified stable across PYTHONHASHSEED variation.

security.notes: No injectable filesystem or network surface. The only agent-controlled free text (prompt) never reaches a filesystem path: PNG writes use the machine-derived image_id (img_+10hex) only, so no path traversal via prompt or image_id. Pollinations URL interpolates the prompt path-segment through urllib.parse.quote(prompt, safe='') (fully encoded, no URL/SSRF injection); Cloudflare sends the prompt in a JSON body, not the URL. Provider fetch_png never raises into the loop, has a bounded 12s timeout, and the loop swallows all fetch exceptions. Tests are fully hermetic (EM_IMAGEGEN_MOCK=1 in conftest, no network), self-cleaning (per-test tmp_path), and write nothing into the repo. StaticFiles /assets mount relies on Starlette's traversal-hardened serving and the directory is created defensively on boot.

regression.notes: Full backend suite 1012 passed (1001 wave-gate baseline + my 11 new integration tests); 0 failures. Frontend 896 passed across 76 files; tsc -b exit 0. The wave-gate baseline (backend 1001, frontend 896, tsc 0, build ok) holds. Wave I state is additive and conditional in to_snapshot, so pre-Wave-I snapshots remain byte-identical (proven by test). No existing test perturbed; no side-artifacts leaked into the repo data/assets/images during the full run.

test_results.backend: 1012 passed in ~40s (backend/.venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests/ -q). Includes 11 new tests in backend/tests/test_wave_i_integration.py and the 26 impl-agent tests in test_wave_i_atelier.py. Determinism stable across PYTHONHASHSEED=1,2,3.
test_results.frontend: 896 passed across 76 files (npx vitest run); npx tsc -b exit 0 (no type errors).

issues: Minor (non-blocking): the replay/fork determinism guarantee proven here is base-snapshot + same-action-stream determinism (two forks of one snapshot, or two same-seed runs of the same script, are byte-identical). A fork legitimately restarts the agent's reasoning/LLM stream, so a fork-continuation is NOT expected to byte-match a single uninterrupted run of the same length (the MockProvider's per-agent script position resets on fork). The image-id seed (place, proposer, ordinal, city_seed) injects no entropy at the snapshot boundary - that is what EM-155 requires and what is tested.

Minor (non-blocking): the loop's best-effort fetch task is fire-and-forget; in production a fetch in flight when the agent re-paints the same tick+place is fine because image_id collisions bump the ordinal at create time. The PNG side-artifact is intentionally off the replay surface, so a missing/partial PNG cannot affect determinism (tests assert on gallery/event/banner, not pixels).
Observation (no action): a stale qa-report.json from a prior wave existed at coordination/qa-report.json and was overwritten with this Wave I report (qe-agent owns this file per contract section 10).

gate_decision.reason: All contract seams conform end-to-end, the EM-155 replay/fork keystone is byte-identical across lineages and stable across hash seeds, snapshots are additive/byte-identical pre-Wave-I, the loop drain is hermetic and non-raising, and no injectable path/network surface exists. Full suites green (backend 1012, frontend 896, tsc 0). No CRITICAL/HIGH blockers; all scores >= 3.
